summary: Planned non-mutating PR inventory classification only. The preflight artifact hydrates 20 of 25 listed PRs; no shared canonical was provided or inferred, low-signal closeout is disabled, and merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter. Hydrated PRs were kept independent unless maintainer/product judgment or missing hydration prevents a reliable single-item classification.
